Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
Type hierarchy:
  • MarshalledMap / MarshalledList — neutral, marshaller-agnostic base classes carrying typed accessors, fluent setters, bean integration, and PathTraversal-based path navigation. Their default Object.toString() is the inherited LinkedHashMap / LinkedList form.
  • JsonMap / JsonList — strict-JSON-flavored subclasses. Their toString() renders as strict RFC 8259 JSON via CharMarshaller.of(Object), and their (CharSequence) / (Reader) constructors and ofString(...) factories default to JsonParser.DEFAULT.
  • Json5Map / Json5List (in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5) — JSON5-flavored siblings of JsonMap / JsonList. Their toString() renders as JSON5 via CharMarshaller.of(Object), and their (CharSequence) / (Reader) constructors and ofString(...) factories default to Json5Parser.DEFAULT. These are the drop-in replacement for callers that previously relied on JsonMap.toString() producing JSON5 or on new JsonMap("{unquoted:'json5'}") parsing JSON5.
  • ResolvingMarshalledMap — a MarshalledMap subclass that resolves SVL variables on every value lookup. Renamed from ResolvingJsonMap and re-parented from JsonMap in 10.0 since SVL resolution is language-agnostic.

Per-marshaller flavored XMap / XList pairs (e.g. XmlMap, YamlMap, UonMap) for the remaining languages are planned as a follow-on and are not delivered in 10.0; parser sessions other than JsonParserSession and Json5ParserSession currently produce the neutral MarshalledMap / MarshalledList when parsing into unbound Object / Map<String,Object> / Collection<Object> targets.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    JsonList
    Java implementation of a JSON array.
    JsonMap
    Java implementation of a JSON object.
    JsonPointer
    An RFC 6901 JSON Pointer that addresses a single value within a Map/List tree (such as the MarshalledMap/MarshalledList family).
    MarshalledList
    Neutral, marshaller-agnostic list of objects.
    MarshalledMap
    Neutral, marshaller-agnostic map of string-to-object entries.
    MarshalledNode
    Typed tree façade over the generic-collections model (MarshalledMap / MarshalledList and their JsonMap / JsonList subclasses).
    ResolvingMarshalledMap
    Subclass of a MarshalledMap that automatically resolves any SVL variables in values.
